docs.text: DANS SWH Deposit Form for researchers ¶ Living Document (WIP), 21 December 2023 This work is carried out in the context of the FC4E project (Data Infrastructure Capacities for EOSC), funded by the EU's Horizon 2020 project call HORIZON-INFRA-2021-EOSC-01. It is developed by Task 6.1: "API and Connectors Between Scholarly Repositories and Software Heritage", as part of the working package 6 (WP6): "Services and tools to archive, reference, describe and cite research software".
